lemon_market_new_listings.description: Poor condition.
The car is in poor condition. The exterior has significant damage and the interior is heavily worn. It has major mechanical issues and requires extensive repairs to be roadworthy.

This vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has significant rust, multiple large dents, and peeling paint. The interior upholstery is heavily worn and torn. The engine requires major repairs and is currently not running reliably.

This vehicle is in pristine, showroom condition and has been meticulously cared for. The exterior is flawless with no scratches or dents, and the interior remains in like-new condition. Mechanically perfect with full service records available, this car represents a rare opportunity for a collector or enthusiast seeking a truly mint example.

Get ready to be amazed by this absolute standout! This car is in pristine, mint condition, appearing and driving just as if it were brand new. From its flawless exterior finish to its spotless, showroom-quality interior, every detail has been meticulously preserved. It is a rare find for anyone seeking a vehicle that has been cared for with the utmost attention and pride.

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a reliable daily driver, though it shows clear signs of its age and mileage. The exterior paint has some fading on the hood and roof, along with several noticeable scratches and minor dings consistent with regular use. Inside, the upholstery shows visible wear and some staining on the carpets, though all essential electronics and controls are functioning. Mechanically, the car is operational and drives fine, but a potential buyer should expect to address some upcoming maintenance items like tires or a minor suspension refresh in the near future. It’s an honest car for someone who prioritizes utility over aesthetics.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, currently offered in prime operational condition. Featuring a consistent service history and a well-preserved interior, this automobile represents an exceptional balance of performance and long-term value. Its mechanical integrity and refined aesthetic ensure a sophisticated driving experience for its next owner. This is a distinguished opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a reliable, high-caliber pre-owned vehicle.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, she’s been a total gem. It’s in really solid shape and runs like a dream—perfect for someone looking for a reliable daily driver that still looks great on the road. I’ve taken good care of it, so it’s ready to go to a new home today! Feel free to reach out if you have any questions or want to take it for a spin. Looking forward to meeting you!
This E46 M3 features the legendary S54B32 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle
Used car in good condition. Reliable engine. Clean interior. Regular maintenance performed. Title in hand.

This meticulously maintained luxury SUV offers the perfect balance of performance and comfort. The exterior features a deep obsidian metallic finish that retains a high gloss, with only minor cosmetic stone chips on the front fascia consistent with regular highway use. Inside, the cabin provides a smoke-free environment with premium charcoal leather upholstery that remains supple; while there is light creasing on the driver’s side bolster, the interior is otherwise remarkably clean and free of tears. All technological features, including the high-definition navigation system, premium surround-sound audio, and panoramic sunroof, are fully operational. Mechanically, this vehicle is in strong health with a documented service history included for peace of mind. It recently underwent a comprehensive multi-point inspection, receiving a fresh oil change and new brake pads. The engine delivers smooth, responsive power, and the transmission shifts seamlessly through all gears. With approximately 75% tread remaining on the all-season tires, this vehicle is turn-key ready for its next owner.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies consistent performance and structural integrity. This unit has been thoroughly vetted to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for mechanical reliability and aesthetic appeal. An ideal acquisition for the discerning driver seeking a balance of proven longevity and exceptional value.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, which demonstrates a high standard of mechanical integrity and aesthetic preservation. Having undergone a comprehensive professional assessment, this unit offers a dependable and sophisticated driving experience. It serves as a premier selection for the buyer seeking a reliable asset with a distinguished road presence and a consistent performance history.

Hey there! I’m looking to find a new home for my trusty car. It’s been a fantastic, reliable ride for me and is still in really solid shape both inside and out! It drives super smoothly and has plenty of life left in it for its next owner. If you're looking for a dependable vehicle that’s been well-loved and taken care of, this is the one for you. Drop me a message if you want to come see it!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies. The chassis remains taut with a factory-spec limited-slip differential and essential subframe reinforcement to address common floor-pan fatigue. Recent comprehensive service includes a VANOS overhaul and precise valve clearance adjustment, ensuring the high-revving valvetrain operates within factory tolerances. Paired with a 6-speed Getrag manual transmission, this example offers visceral feedback and exceptional longitudinal and lateral dynamics. While showing light patina consistent with a well-loved driver, its mechanical integrity and cooling system upgrades make it a formidable performer on both B-roads and the track.
Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Runs well.

This 2019 Lexus RX 350 represents a fantastic opportunity to own a meticulously maintained luxury SUV. The Nebula Gray Pearl exterior retains a deep gloss, with only the minor, superficial imperfections one would expect from careful daily use. Inside, the Parchment leather cabin is exceptionally clean, smoke-free, and shows very little wear on the bolsters or high-touch surfaces. All electronic features, including the intuitive navigation system and dual-zone climate control, operate flawlessly. Under the hood, the V6 engine runs quietly and pulls strongly, backed by a comprehensive service history and a recent oil change and brake inspection. Equipped with a fresh set of premium tires and a clean title, this vehicle offers a smooth, reliable, and refined driving experience for its next owner.

Presenting a distinguished example of automotive engineering, this vehicle maintains a commendable standard of mechanical integrity and aesthetic preservation. Rigorously inspected to ensure consistent performance, it offers a sophisticated driving experience for the discerning owner. This offering represents a premier opportunity to acquire a well-maintained asset at a competitive market valuation.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Featuring a robust powertrain and a refined interior, the automobile has been serviced regularly to ensure sustained mechanical integrity. While it exhibits minor signs of use consistent with responsible ownership, its overall performance and sophisticated presence remain exceptional. We invite serious inquiries to experience the caliber of this distinguished offering.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, she's been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has clearly been well-taken care of over the years. Whether you're commuting to work or heading out for a weekend getaway, this car is ready to hit the road with you! I've loved every mile in it, and I'm sure you will too. Feel free to reach out if you want to take it for a spin!

Offering a mechanically sound BMW E46 M3 featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six engine with individual throttle bodies and high-pressure double-VANOS. This example is equipped with the desirable Getrag 6-speed manual transmission and a 3.62 limited-slip differential. Critical maintenance has been prioritized, including documented rod bearing replacement and a recent valve shim adjustment to ensure optimal valvetrain clearance. The chassis is reinforced at the rear subframe mounting points to mitigate fatigue, and the suspension remains taut with upgraded polyurethane bushings. While showing minor aesthetic patina consistent with its driver-quality status, the powertrain and drivetrain remain robust, delivering linear power and precise heel-and-toe engagement.
Used car in good condition. Reliable engine. Clean title. Minor wear on interior. Ready for immediate sale.

This meticulously maintained executive sedan offers a perfect balance of luxury and performance. The exterior boasts a deep, lustrous finish, showing only the minor road wear expected of a vehicle that has been loved and driven. Inside, you’ll find a smoke-free cabin with premium leather upholstery that remains soft and supportive, featuring only slight creasing on the driver’s side seat bolster. All electronics, from the intuitive infotainment system to the dual-zone climate control, function flawlessly. Mechanically, this car is sound; it features a complete service history, a recently replaced battery, and premium tires with significant tread remaining. It drives straight and true, providing a smooth, quiet ride that feels as solid as the day it left the showroom. This is a turn-key vehicle

I'd love for it to go to a good home, so feel free to reach out if you want to come see it!

Used vehicle. Good condition. Clean title. Maintenance up to date. Reliable runner.

This vehicle represents a fantastic balance of performance and pride of ownership. The exterior paint retains a deep, lustrous shine, accented by a body that is straight and free of major blemishes, save for a few minor stone chips on the front fascia that attest to its honest road use. Inside, the cabin is remarkably clean and inviting; the upholstery is well-preserved with only light softening of the driver’s side bolster, and all interior electronics, including the infotainment and climate control systems, function perfectly. Under the hood, the engine is clean and runs smoothly, reflecting a history of consistent, timely maintenance. It has recently undergone a comprehensive inspection and oil service, ensuring it is ready for the road immediately. Shifting is crisp, the suspension is tight, and the tires have ample tread remaining. Garage-kept and smoke-free, this car offers a premium driving experience for those who value a vehicle that has been treated with care.

This distinguished vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning motorist. Meticulously maintained and presented in commendable condition, it offers a refined driving experience characterized by mechanical integrity and a sophisticated aesthetic. Our comprehensive inspection confirms that this model adheres to rigorous standards of safety and performance, ensuring its status as a reliable and prestigious acquisition. A superior choice for those who demand excellence and long-term value.
